prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota-sourced 1NZ-FE (1.5L inline-4) with a forged internals kit from Tomei, including forged pistons (88mm bore, 8.5:1 compression), billet crankshaft, and H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L

ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone unit with custom maps for E85 fuel (flex-fuel compatible), optimized for 1.5 bar boost pressure, 220cc injectors from ID1000, and a custom intercooler setup by GReddy (Type-S front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) with silicone couplers from Mishimoto

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 2-way compression/rebound), Cusco 22mm front sway bar (adjustable), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) for the front control arms, paired with Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (305mm rotors) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Varis Japan (Copen-specific, includes front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser), with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof

Custom front bumper lip by Rocket Bunny (Copen Race Series-specific, aggressive splitter with integrated canards) and a rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3D carbon fiber, adjustable angle) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full bolt-in roll cage by AutoPower (6-point, chromoly steel, Copen-specific design), Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (330mm diameter, suede) with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations
